definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="controls_if"><mutation elseif="2"></mutation><value name="IF0"><block type="text_binary_ops"><value name="A"><block type="get_command_parameter_string"><field name="param">windows_message_box</field></block></value><value name="B"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">show</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">WindowsMessageBox.show ("Recollection", "This is a normal test.");</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">("Name on top", "Message inside")</comment></block></statement><value name="IF1"><block type="text_binary_ops"><value name="A"><block type="get_command_parameter_string"><field name="param">windows_message_box</field></block></value><value name="B"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">warn</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO1"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">WindowsMessageBox.warn ("Recollection", "This is a warn test.");</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">("Name on top", "Message inside")</comment></block></statement><value name="IF2"><block type="text_binary_ops"><value name="A"><block type="get_command_parameter_string"><field name="param">windows_message_box</field></block></value><value name="B"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">error</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO2"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">WindowsMessageBox.error("Recollection", "This is a error test.");</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">("Name on top", "Message inside")</comment></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
